title: Rottlerin stimulates exosome/microvesicle release via the in-crease of ceramide levels mediated by AMPK in an in vitro model of intracellular lipid accumulation
author: Rebeca Busto
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Supplementary Materials:  Figure S1: Effects of the drugs used on cell viability in C6 cells.; Figure S2. Effect of rottlerin on sphingolipids species content. Figure S3. Effects of rottlerin on gene expression of enzymes involved in glucosylceramide metabolism. Figure S4. An overview of the sphingolipid metabolism pathway. Table S1. Sequence of PCR primers used in quantitative real-time PCR.
